misconfig_patterns: Kubernetes RBAC not applied to InferenceService endpoints

active_probe.false_positive_check: response or error body must reference kserve — KFServing V2 error format includes kserve in server identification

deployment_tells: Kubernetes-native annotations in HTTP response headers
Port inherits from runtime (8080 for vLLM/TGI)
pivot_paths: InferenceService metadata → namespace + model name → full K8s context
Kubernetes service account token → cluster pivot if RBAC misconfigured
ServingRuntime spec → identify backing runtime and its own CVE surface
